body:
**Uberon term**
UBERON:0000379 tracheal mucosa
- UBERON:0001826 nasal cavity mucosa

**Bug description**

Intuitively, the parent-child relationship from Uberon shown below does not seem correct:
UBERON:0000379 tracheal mucosa
- UBERON:0001826 nasal cavity mucosa

[Original issue from HumanDiseaseOntology](https://github.com/DiseaseOntology/HumanDiseaseOntology/issues/1541)

comments.body:
Agreed.  Looks like this comes from inference.

@dragon-ai-agent please fix by changing respiratory airway to trachea in this axiom:

UBERON:0000379 tracheal mucosa
Equivalent to
([mucosa](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols4/ontologies/uberon/classes/http%253A%252F%252Fpurl.obolibrary.org%252Fobo%252FUBERON_0000344?lang=en) and [part of](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols4/ontologies/uberon/properties/http%253A%252F%252Fpurl.obolibrary.org%252Fobo%252FBFO_0000050?lang=en) some [respiratory airway](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols4/ontologies/uberon/classes/http%253A%252F%252Fpurl.obolibrary.org%252Fobo%252FUBERON_0001005?lang=en))

If this doesn't fix, also check for hard coded UBERON:0001826 nasal cavity mucosa subclassOf UBERON:0000379 tracheal mucosa

title: Parent-child relationship between tracheal mucosa and nasal cavity mucosa
